# format: html5-dom-v2
# status: active
# include_parse_errors: true

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      "x"
      element ns=html local="div" attrs=[]
        "y"
      element ns=html local="table" attrs=[]
parse-errors:
  tree-builder: in-table-text-non-space-foster-parented
  tree-builder: in-table-anything-else-reprocess-in-body
  tree-builder: in-table-anything-else-reprocess-in-body
